en_title: Avengers: Doomsday 'Leak' Pulled Offline Just as it Spreads Across Social Media
cn_title: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》泄漏片段被下架，但已传遍社交网络
subtitle: 真假难辨
opus_summary: 一段疑似《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》中X战警与复仇者联手对抗毁灭博士的泄漏片段在社交媒体疯传后被版权方要求下架。视频曾以低像素和更清晰版本出现，均被移除。

paragraphs.en: What appears to be a short clip of the X-Men in Avengers: Doomsday has been pulled offline, but not before it spread across social media like wildfire.
paragraphs.cn: 一段似乎是《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》中X战警片段的短视频已被下架，但在此之前已在社交媒体上疯传。

paragraphs.en: The long wait for Avengers: Doomsday has left Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) fans desperate for updates. So, when what seemed to be a pixelated video featuring an unfinished scene from the new movie showed up online a few weeks ago, they latched on, even if it showed little more than a very, very blurry look at an X-Men and Avengers team-up against Doctor Doom.
paragraphs.cn: 对《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》的漫长等待让漫威电影宇宙（MCU）粉丝急切渴望新消息。因此，当几周前网上出现一段似乎是该片未完成场景的低像素视频时，他们立刻抓住了它，即使它只展示了X战警与复仇者联手对抗毁灭博士的极其模糊的画面。

paragraphs.en: That video has gone unchecked since, making the rounds on X/Twitter and Reddit as theories run wild. However, that changed over the weekend when a clearer version of the video started showing up on social media feeds. This time, just as fans got a good look at a new Doctor Doom and the return of characters like Nightcrawler, Beast, Cyclops, Steve Rogers, Gambit, Shang-Chi, and more, the footage was promptly taken down.
paragraphs.cn: 那段视频随后未受管制，在X/Twitter和Reddit上疯传，各种理论层出不穷。然而，周末社交媒体上开始出现一个更清晰的版本。这一次，就在粉丝们刚看清新版毁灭博士以及夜行者、野兽、镭射眼、史蒂夫·罗杰斯、牌皇、尚气等角色的回归时，这段视频迅速被下架。

paragraphs.en: Dozens of posts, which previously featured the more-than-a-minute-long video, now simply display a message notifying that the content has been removed. It says, "This media has been disabled in response to a report by the copyright owner," suggesting Marvel Studios may have caught wind of what could be authentic footage from Avengers: Doomsday.
paragraphs.cn: 数十条原本包含这段长于一分钟视频的帖子，现在只显示一条内容已被移除的通知。上面写着：「此媒体因版权所有者举报而被禁用。」这表明漫威影业可能已察觉到这可能是来自《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》的真实片段。

paragraphs.en: IGN saw the video before it was taken down, but you're not missing much. No matter how many superheroes or MCU callbacks it could have had, this supposedly leaked content featured unfinished VFX shots in what looks like could become a very action-heavy scene. It's not particularly flattering and far from what directors the Russo Brothers likely envision for the final product – and that's if it's even real.
paragraphs.cn: IGN在视频被下架前看过，但你并没错过多少。无论这段据称的泄漏内容有多少超级英雄或MCU彩蛋，它展示的都是未完成的特效镜头，看起来可能是一个动作戏很重的场景。画面并不好看，远非导演罗素兄弟可能为最终成品所设想的模样——前提是它甚至是真的。

paragraphs.en: In the age of AI, it's hard to say what leaks are real , especially when it comes to high-profile movie releases like Avengers: Doomsday. Some have used the new technology to intentionally mislead viewers online, while others are simply fans trying to imagine what it will look like when fan-favorite characters meet up on the big screen.
paragraphs.cn: 在AI时代，很难说哪些泄漏是真的，尤其是对于《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》这样备受瞩目的电影。有些人利用新技术故意误导网友，而另一些人则只是粉丝试图想象那些受欢迎的角色在大银幕上重聚时的样子。

paragraphs.en: What we're left with is uncertainty ahead of Avengers: Doomsday's December premiere, even if this latest leak being pulled offline makes it seem as though Marvel intervened. The leaked footage was online long enough for fans to copy it and grab screenshots, so don't be surprised if you come across spoilers floating around in the months ahead.
paragraphs.cn: 在《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》12月首映之前，我们仍面临不确定性，即使这次最新的泄漏片段被下架似乎表明漫威进行了干预。泄漏的视频在网上存在的时间足够长，粉丝们可以复制并截图，所以未来几个月如果你遇到剧透，不要惊讶。

paragraphs.en: Either way, we're definitely overdue for an Avengers: Doomsday trailer. The movie is set to premiere December 18, 2026, but the only (official) trailers the public has received so far have revealed little about its actual story and characters. While we wait for something more concrete, you can see how Tom Holland is doing his best to avoid spoilers for upcoming MCU projects . You can also read about what Jean Grey actress Famke Janssen had to say about being left out of the new Avengers flicks .
paragraphs.cn: 无论如何，我们肯定早该看到《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》的预告片了。该片定于2026年12月18日首映，但截至目前，公众看到的唯一（官方）预告片几乎没有透露其实际故事和角色。在等待更确切消息的同时，你可以看看汤姆·赫兰德如何极力避免未来漫威项目的剧透，还可以看看饰演琴·葛蕾的Famke Janssen对未能出演新的《复仇者联盟》电影有何说法。
